items.name: AUREIX - Vibrant Visionary Graphic Tee
items.description:
The shirt showcases a vivid, stylized portrait of a bearded figure, adorned with colorful hair clips and a striking red star over the eye. Hand-drawn elements like sunbursts and a playful cloud add a whimsical, artistic touch. The name "AUREIX" is rendered in a multi-colored, distressed graffiti style, with a small "CERTAIN FANS" stamp detail at the bottom left.
Style & Fit: Designed for a relaxed, boxy fit with slightly dropped shoulders, this premium tee is a unique blend of high-art and street culture. It’s an essential piece for anyone looking to make a vibrant, artistic statement.

Release: 2025 | AUREIX ORIGINAL

items.name: Silver "Waki" (Waist-Side)
items.description:
NOTE: The REAL name of this weapon has been censored by Roblox. 

This variant has been mounted on the left side of your waist and is meant to complement the longer "Katana". Meant to be worn alongside longer nihontō, this replica of a 16th century "Waki" was meant to complement Samurai as a secondary backup to the Katana. To commemorate the release of UGC limiteds, Nomino Heavy Industries' Historical Branch Division has released a simple black and silver version engraved with NHI-HBD's logo.

Accompanying Katana: (IN PROGRESS)

Modeled and textured by: matthewthecowboy 

For more items, visit Nomino Heavy Industries' Store page here: https://www.roblox.com/groups/16496578/Nomino-Heavy-Industries#!/store
